description_long: This is a tall, dark glass wine bottle with a deep red foil capsule covering the neck and closure. The front of the bottle features a rectangular label with the brand name 'TALAY' in bold white letters on a maroon background, and below it, a cream-colored section with the word 'KARALAJNA' and a decorative emblem. The bottle has a classic Bordeaux shape, with a long, gently tapering neck and broad shoulders. The back label contains product information, safety icons, and additional branding details. The glass is glossy and reflective, with a smooth surface and a slight greenish tint visible in the highlights. The bottle appears full, with the contents obscured by the dark glass.
description: A tall, dark glass wine bottle with a maroon foil capsule and detailed front and back labels. The bottle has a classic Bordeaux shape and glossy finish.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing the maroon foil capsule and a partial view of both the front and back labels.
description_view_1: The front label is fully visible, displaying the 'TALAY' branding and 'KARALAJNA' text with a decorative emblem.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, with the maroon foil capsule and partial label visibility.
description_view_3: The back label is fully visible, showing product information, safety icons, and additional branding.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label: 'TALAY' in bold white on maroon, 'KARALAJNA' in gold on cream, decorative emblem; Back label: product information, safety icons, additional branding. Labels are rectangular, placed centrally on front and back, with clear, legible text.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, gently tapering neck with a straight profile and a slight flare at the lip.
